prompt: I want a daily rain warning every morning by email.

scenarios.name: happy-path
scenarios.description: Email is sent warning of rain
scenarios.dataSetup: Weather forecast for today is heavy rain: 12mm of precipitation and a 100% chance of rain.
scenarios.successCriteria: The workflow executes without errors. An email is sent to the email specified mentioning that it will rain today.

scenarios.name: rain-not-expected
scenarios.dataSetup: Weather forecast for today is completely dry: 0mm of precipitation and a 0% chance of rain.
scenarios.successCriteria: The workflow executes without errors. No email is sent mentioning that it will rain today, and no email sending node is executed.
